channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Approval on Iran low Even as Tentative Deal to End Fighting Emerged, New AP-NORC Poll Finds
item.description: Most Americans still disapprove of Trump's handling of Iran, while his overall approval remains steady, according to a new poll.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Danhausenâs Smart Dodge Shows Why Entertainers Should Stick to Entertainment
It's About to Go Down: FBI Descends on LA Skid Row Over Potential Voter Fraud/Bribery of Homeless
Senator Urges FAA to Reject Trump Pressure on Arch Approval
item.description: Sen. Tammy Duckworth urged the FAA chief to resist any pressure from President Trump regarding the approval.
